name: TREND_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Given a TargetPair, return yearly patent counts and cumulative counts over time.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH y.year AS year, count(p) AS yearly
ORDER BY year
WITH collect({year:year, yearly:yearly}) AS rows
UNWIND range(0, size(rows)-1) AS i
WITH rows[i] AS row,
     reduce(total = 0, r IN rows[0..i+1] | total + r.yearly) AS cumulative
RETURN row.year AS year, row.yearly AS yearly_count, cumulative
ORDER BY year
LIMIT 50;

examples: How has the PD-1×VEGFA patent landscape evolved over recent years?
